title: Diagram-to-IaC Normalized Intermediate Representation
description: Schema for the normalized IR produced by the diagram parser and consumed by downstream IaC-generation agents.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema. Bump the major version on breaking changes.

source_file.description: S3 key of the source diagram file that produced this IR.

services.description: All AWS resource nodes extracted from the diagram.

id.description: Stable node identifier from the source diagram (e.g. draw.io mxCell id).

type.description: Terraform resource type, e.g. aws_instance. 'unknown' when the shape was recognized as AWS but unmapped.

label.description: Human-readable label from the diagram, used as the Terraform resource name.

config.description: Key-value pairs extracted directly from the diagram node (e.g. CIDR block from a VPC shape label).

source.description: id of the originating service node.

target.description: id of the destination service node.

relationship_type.description: Semantic relationship between source and target.

label.description: Raw edge label from the diagram, or null for unlabeled edges.

network.description: Denormalized view of network topology derived from the services list. Populated automatically by the parser for aws_vpc, aws_subnet, and aws_security_group resources.

cidr_block.description: CIDR block if parseable from the diagram label, e.g. '10.0.0.0/16'.

vpc_id.description: id of the parent VPC if determinable from diagram containment.

availability_zone.description: AZ if present in the label, e.g. 'us-east-1a'.

description.description: Free-text description if present in the diagram label.
